test_criteria.evidence: TestArchetypeCoverage.test_missing_common_archetype_is_seeded_as_gap asserts coastal count==0, is_gap==True, and included in coverage_gaps
TestArchetypeCoverage.test_missing_niche_archetype_is_seeded_as_gap asserts adventure count==0, is_gap==True, and included in coverage_gaps

code_review.seeding_logic: scripts/curation/pipeline/quality/coverage_report.py:_compute_archetype_coverage seeds counts with Counter({archetype: 0 for archetype in sorted(COMMON_ARCHETYPES | NICHE_ARCHETYPES)}), ensuring all required common+niche archetypes exist with 0 when absent.
code_review.gap_flagging: Seeded archetypes participate in the same tiered threshold logic (common=50, niche=20) and therefore are correctly flagged as gaps when count==0.
notes: Non-blocking: archetype matching is case-sensitive (no normalization in _extract_archetype); inputs like 'Twisties' would not increment 'twisties' and could falsely report a gap.

acceptance_criteria.notes: All required common archetypes are present in report even when absent from routes.

acceptance_criteria.evidence: Seeding includes NICHE_ARCHETYPES + regression test test_missing_niche_archetype_is_seeded_as_gap passes.
acceptance_criteria.notes: All required niche archetypes are present in report even when absent from routes.
